All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
BaseQuery
 
BaseQueryBuilder<Q extends BaseQuery,SELF extends BaseQueryBuilder<Q,SELF>>
 
BasicQuery
 
BasicQueryBuilder
 
ClientConfiguration
Interface for Meilisearch Configuration.
ClientConfigurationBuilder
A builder for Meilisearch ClientConfiguration.
DefaultClientConfiguration
Default implementation of ClientConfiguration.
Document
Identifies a domain object to be persisted to Meilisearch.
DocumentAccessException
Exception thrown when there is an error accessing a document.
DocumentOperations
The operations for the Documents API.
Embedder
Meilisearch embedder setting.
Embedder.InputType
 
Embedder.Source
 
Embedder.TriState
 
EmbedderParameter
Key-value parameter used by Meilisearch embedder settings.
EnableMeilisearchRepositories
Annotation to enable Meilisearch repositories.
FacetHit
 
Faceting
Meilisearch Faceting
FacetQuery
 
FacetQueryBuilder
 
FederationResponse
Response property of federated multi-search.
IndexAccessException
Exception indicating that an index could not be found.
IndexQuery
 
IndexQueryBuilder
 
LocalizedAttribute
Annotation to specify localized attributes at the index level.
MappingMeilisearchConverter
MeilisearchConverter Implementation based on MappingContext.
MappingMeilisearchEntityInformation<T,ID>
Implementation of MeilisearchEntityInformation.
MeilisearchCallback<T>
Callback interface for low level operations executed against a Meilisearch environment.
MeilisearchClient
Extension of Client that allows to configure the additional attributes that are required for request timeout and retry handling.
MeilisearchClientBeanDefinitionParser
BeanDefinitionParser class that parses the client tag in the XML configuration file.The client tag is parsed by setting the host URL, API key, JSON handler, and client agents.
MeilisearchClientFactoryBean
FactoryBean class that creates a MeilisearchClient.
MeilisearchConfiguration
Base class for a @Configuration class to set up the Meilisearch connection using the Meilisearch Client.
MeilisearchConfigurationSupport
Support class forMeilisearchConfiguration.
MeilisearchConverter
Meilisearch converter aware of MappingContext.
MeilisearchCustomConversions
Meilisearch specific CustomConversions.
MeilisearchEntityInformation<T,ID>
Entity information for Meilisearch.
MeilisearchEntityInformationCreator
Interface to create MeilisearchEntityInformation.
MeilisearchEntityInformationCreatorImpl
Implementation of MeilisearchEntityInformationCreator.
MeilisearchNamespaceHandler
NamespaceHandler class that registers namespaces in the XML configuration file.
MeilisearchOperations
The operations for Meilisearch APIs.
MeilisearchPersistentEntity<T>
Meilisearch specific PersistentEntity abstraction.
MeilisearchPersistentProperty
Meilisearch specific PersistentProperty abstraction.
MeilisearchPersistentProperty.PropertyToFieldNameConverter
 
MeilisearchRepository<T,ID>
Repository interface for Meilisearch.
MeilisearchRepositoryConfigExtension
RepositoryConfigurationExtension implementation to configure Meilisearch repository configuration support.
MeilisearchRepositoryFactory
Factory to create SimpleMeilisearchRepository instances.
MeilisearchRepositoryFactoryBean<T extends Repository<S,ID>,S,ID extends Serializable>
FactoryBean to create Repository instances.
MeilisearchTemplate
Implementation of MeilisearchOperations.
MinWordSizeForTypos
Minimum word size configuration for typos
Pagination
Meilisearch Pagination
Query
Query interface for Meilisearch operations
RequestConverter
Class to convert Spring Data Meilisearch classes into Meilisearch requests.
ResponseConverter
Class to convert Meilisearch classes into Spring Data Meilisearch responses.
SearchHit<T>
 
SearchHits<T>
 
SearchHitsImpl<T>
 
SearchHitSupport
 
SearchOperations
The operations for the below Meilisearch APIs.
SearchPage<T>
Page definition for repositories that need to return a paged SearchHits.
Setting
Meilisearch Setting
SimilarQuery
 
SimilarQueryBuilder
 
SimpleMeilisearchMappingContext
Meilisearch specific AbstractMappingContext implementation.
SimpleMeilisearchPersistentEntity<T>
Meilisearch specific BasicPersistentEntity implementation holding.
SimpleMeilisearchPersistentProperty
Meilisearch specific PersistentEntity implementation holding.
SimpleMeilisearchRepository<T,ID>
Meilisearch specific repository implementation.
Synonym
Meilisearch Synonym
TaskStatusException
Exception indicating that a task status was not successful.
TypoTolerance
Meilisearch Typo Tolerance
UncategorizedMeilisearchException
Uncategorized exception for Meilisearch.
